step_rationale: Aspirin-triggered lipid mediator suppressing leukocyte and platelet activation.
mechanism: 15-epi-lipoxin A4 is an aspirin-triggered anti-inflammatory lipid mediator that limits plaque inflammation and platelet recruitment.

references.title: Antiinflammatory effects of aspirin in ACS: relevant to its cardiocoronary actions?

trials.title: The Effect of Ticagrelor on 15-Epi-Lipoxin A4 and Inflammation
